verified.title: Verified Members
verified.body: Our community is built on trust. Every member undergoes a rigorous identity verification process to ensure a secure and friendly environment for everyone.

public.title: Public-Only Meetups
public.body: For your safety, all meetups must take place in public places such as Cafes, Restaurants, Malls, or Parks. Meetups at hotels or private residences are strictly prohibited.

live.title: Safety Features
live.body: Use our in-app safety tools to share your live location and meetup details with trusted friends or family members while you hang out.

community.title: Respectful Community
community.body: CoBuddy operates on mutual respect. Our strict community guidelines ensure every interaction is polite, friendly, and comfortable for all.

modal.title: Safety Guidelines
modal.identity_text: All members are required to complete a profile verification step to keep our platform authentic and secure.
modal.contacts_text: You can easily share your session details and live location with your personal emergency contacts directly through the app.
modal.verified_text: We strictly enforce a public-places-only rule. Meetups must always happen in visible, high-traffic areas like cafes or malls to ensure everyone's comfort.
